report.summary: Community growth cycle v14: Babylon Protocol Bitcoin Staking hold-draft cleared (PUBLISHED); Exchange/Wallet/Staking hub explosion (10+ new pages live); Uniswap v4 Hooks Guide published; drafted Babylon launch tweet, exchange hub drop tweet, Ledger vs Trezor 6-post thread, Uniswap v4 hooks tweet, altcoin ETF tracker tweet, staking poll, Discord/Telegram announcement, full v14 newsletter (Mar 26 send), hold-drafts for Kaito/BTCFi/Aave v4; 2 new SVG social cards created (social-exchange-wallet-hub.svg, social-uniswap-v4-hooks-guide.svg); Babylon card already exists from v12.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Sunday Mar 22 — CLEARED): Babylon Protocol launch — 'Bitcoin is earning yield now. Not wrapped BTC. Not a synthetic.' — $1.9B TVL, 57K BTC, 0.5–1.2% APY, slash-proof timelocks; CTA to /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking. Hold-draft from v12 now cleared.

Tweet (Monday Mar 23): Exchange hub drop — 'We built the exchange guide we always wanted. Not sorted by affiliate commission.' — categorized by use case (beginners, advanced, low-fee); CTA to /exchanges/best

Discord/Telegram (Monday Mar 23): Exchange + Wallet hub announcement — Exchange comparisons + Ledger/Trezor/MetaMask/Phantom reviews + Staking hub + Lido review; links to /exchanges/best, /wallets/best, /investing/staking

Twitter thread (Tuesday Mar 24, 6 posts): Ledger vs Trezor deep dive — Secure Element vs open-source model; 2020 data breach context; UX comparison (Ledger Live vs Trezor Suite); price breakdown; bottom line buy recommendation; CTAs to /wallets/reviews/ledger and /wallets/reviews/trezor
Tweet (Wednesday Mar 25): Uniswap v4 Hooks — 'Hooks let you attach custom logic to any liquidity pool. Limit orders. Dynamic fees. MEV protection.' — CTA to /learn/uniswap-v4-hooks-guide
Tweet (Thursday Mar 26): Altcoin ETF Tracker launch — 8+ SEC applications, Solana/XRP/Litecoin tracking; CTA to /tools/altcoin-etf-tracker
Twitter poll (Friday Mar 28): ETH staking poll — Lido vs Rocket Pool vs Coinbase vs solo validator; drives to /investing/staking

Newsletter (Thursday Mar 26 send): Full draft — market pulse (BTC $71K, Pectra 23 days, FOMC passed); 5 new-on-degen0x sections (Babylon, exchange hub, wallet reviews, staking hub, altcoin ETF tracker); worth reading (Uniswap v4 hooks, Pectra guide); Degen Corner on BTC native yield and Bloomberg Screener + attention markets combo edge
Hold-draft tweet: Kaito AI InfoFi — trigger on publish day for /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide (still in PUBLISH_QUEUE)
Hold-draft tweet: BTCFi Guide 2026 — trigger on publish day for /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026 (still in PUBLISH_QUEUE)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-exchange-wallet-hub.svg — 1200×630 social card: three exchange category panels (Beginners / Advanced / Low Fee) each showing top 3 ranked exchanges with color-coded rank badges; indigo/cyan/amber panel accents matching category; decorative glow orbs; 'NO AFFILIATE BIAS' badge bottom-right; 'degen0x.com/exchanges/best' URL; '+ WALLET REVIEWS' badge. Saved to /public/social-exchange-wallet-hub.svg

social-uniswap-v4-hooks-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: purple/indigo/cyan theme; horizontal architecture flow diagram showing Pool → Hook Contract → Custom Logic with animated dashed arrows; 4 capability pills on right (Limit Orders, Dynamic Fees, MEV Protection, On-chain Oracle); subtle grid background; '✓ No protocol fork required' callout; '● MAINNET LIVE' badge. Saved to /public/social-uniswap-v4-hooks-guide.svg
social-babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking.svg — pre-existing from v12 ✅ (no recreation needed)

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Net-new pages since v13 cycle: Babylon Protocol Bitcoin Staking (hold cleared), tokenized stocks guide + tracker, altcoin ETF guide + tracker, exchange hubs (best/beginners/advanced/low-fee), wallet hubs (best/beginners/mobile), wallet reviews (Ledger, Trezor, MetaMask, Phantom), staking hubs (investing/staking, investing/staking/best, investing/staking/reviews/lido), Uniswap v4 Hooks Guide — 17+ pages total

Still in PUBLISH_QUEUE (hold-drafts pending): /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide, /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026, /learn/aave-v4-guide, exchange reviews (Coinbase, Binance, Kraken, Bybit, OKX), /investing/staking/reviews/rocket-pool, DeFi lending reviews (Aave, Compound, Morpho)
v13 posting schedule (Mon Mar 16 – Sat Mar 21) is complete; v14 schedule opens Sun Mar 22

Babylon tweet is the single strongest individual tweet in the v14 batch — 'Bitcoin is earning native yield' is the clearest hook in crypto right now; $1.9B TVL and 57K BTC give it real numbers to stand on

Exchange hub pages are the highest-volume new SEO surface added since site launch — 'best crypto exchange' and 'ledger vs trezor' are top-10 highest-volume crypto queries; first 30 days of indexing for these pages is critical
Uniswap v4 hooks guide targets developer and DeFi power-user audience — different from typical retail audience; thread format should be technical-first

Community feedback routed: Watchlist feature (Bloomberg Screener) → CEO/PM Sprint 60; Kaito price tracker → Data Engineer; Babylon yield calculator check (BabylonYieldEstimator.tsx may already be live on page) → PM/Programmer verify; Exchange comparison table UX → UX Designer
No bug reports flagged this cycle
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-15-social-drafts-v14.md
Social cards: /public/social-exchange-wallet-hub.svg (new), /public/social-uniswap-v4-hooks-guide.svg (new), /public/social-babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking.svg (v12, carry)
